name: Infinite Innocence
short_description: Infinite Innocence is a game about finding anomalies, but it is very easy to see them with lighting. What if we give it a little more difficulty and tension? Will you be able to remember everything until the end?
detailed_description:
There is no luck here, only your perception can save you. Turn on the flashlight and get ready for the ultimate challenge.

With a difficulty where you must prepare yourself because every success feels deserved and every mistake is a lesson. Are you ready to face the darkness and what lies hidden in it?

About the game

In Infinite Innocence, you will face a challenge that tests your perception. This is no ordinary game of anomalies, it is a test of cunning and determination. It is very easy to see anomalies with lighting, but what if we give it a little more difficulty and tension? There is no room for chance, each anomaly must be precisely identified and exterminated. The game offers increasing difficulty that will challenge even the most experienced players. Get ready to immerse yourself in an experience where light is your only guide and darkness, your greatest enemy.

How to play and Features

Memorize, find, assign and exterminate. Every mistake is paid dearly and every success brings you closer to the glory of being a true exterminator.

Will you be able to remember everything until the end?
